name: Bluetooth Headphones
product_name: Wireless Bluetooth 5.3 Headphones with Active Noise Cancellation - 40H Battery
features: Advanced Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) reduces ambient noise by 95%
Bluetooth 5.3 with dual-device connection and 15m range
40-hour battery life with USB-C fast charging (10min = 3h playtime)
Memory foam ear cushions with 270° rotatable joints
Built-in AI microphone for crystal-clear calls
Foldable design with premium travel case included
brand_story: SoundWave is a California-based audio brand founded in 2018, dedicated to making premium audio accessible. We believe everyone deserves studio-quality sound without the studio price tag. Our engineers previously worked at Bose and Sony.
image_descriptions: Hero shot: Black headphones on white background, 45° angle showing earcups
Lifestyle shot: Young professional wearing headphones working in modern coffee shop
Feature callout: Exploded view showing ANC technology and 40mm drivers
Comparison shot: SoundWave vs competitor noise cancellation graph
Package contents: Headphones, case, USB-C cable, aux cable, manual

name: Yoga Mat
product_name: Premium Non-Slip Yoga Mat 6mm - Eco-Friendly TPE Material with Alignment Lines
features: Double-layer TPE material with laser-etched alignment lines
6mm optimal thickness: cushioning for joints without losing ground feel
Non-slip texture on both sides, even during hot yoga
Includes carrying strap and storage bag
72" x 26" extra-wide surface for all body types
brand_story: ZenLife was born in Byron Bay, Australia, where founders Sarah and Mike discovered yoga transformed their lives after corporate burnout. Every mat we sell funds one yoga class for underprivileged communities through our 'One Mat, One Class' program.
image_descriptions: Hero shot: Mat rolled out on hardwood floor, morning sunlight
Detail shot: Close-up of alignment lines and texture pattern
Lifestyle shot: Woman in warrior II pose on mat, ocean view background
Comparison: ZenLife mat vs standard PVC mat sweat test
Eco credentials: Infographic showing TPE material lifecycle

name: Desk LED Lamp
product_name: Architect LED Desk Lamp with 5 Color Modes, Auto-Dimming Sensor, USB-C Charging Port
features: Smart auto-dimming sensor adjusts brightness based on ambient light
50,000-hour LED lifespan with flicker-free technology for eye comfort
Built-in USB-C 18W fast charging port for phones/tablets
Memory function remembers your last brightness and color setting
Sturdy aluminum alloy arm with 180° adjustability
brand_story: LumiCraft is a Shenzhen-based design studio that blends Bauhaus minimalism with cutting-edge LED engineering. Founded by industrial designer Chen Wei in 2020, we've served over 200,000 home offices worldwide. Every lamp undergoes 47 quality checks before shipping.
image_descriptions: Hero shot: Lamp on modern desk setup, warm light mode
Detail: Close up of touch-sensitive control panel
Lifestyle: Home office scene with lamp illuminating keyboard area
Feature: 5 color modes comparison strip (warm to cool)
Tech: Exploded diagram showing LED array and heat sink design
